description: A line-chart infographic on a white background titled in large bold black sans-serif type 'Federal Employment'. The y-axis is labeled with employment figures from 2,750,000 up to 3,050,000 in 50,000 increments; the x-axis lists months from January 2025 through November 2025 (labels angled diagonally). A single thick dark navy-blue line plots the data, beginning just above 3,000,000 in January and sloping downward through the year, then dropping sharply between September 2025 (about 2,910,000) and October 2025 (about 2,750,000) before leveling off slightly lower in November. No agency seal appears on the chart itself.
notable_text: Federal Employment (chart title); axis labels January 2025 - November 2025, 2,750,000 - 3,050,000
